text: This is endoclinch, a tissue retrieval bag by the Covidien. This is very important if the gallbladder is inflamed and if you have suspicion of malignancy, you should use endoclinch and you can close it nicely. And it has a metal ring which is self retaining. It's a very tough polypropylene. You can close it and you can pull it into the cannula. If you have the large stone, you can crush it by the ovum forceps and then you can slowly pull it out with stretching the abdominal wall. Endoclinch will not allow the contamination or the malignancy to be transferred to the abdominal wall.
